title: CV Recognition App
tagline: Mobile-friendly object detection — run YOLO models on uploads or live camera from the browser.
description: CV Recognition App is a full-stack computer vision product for running pretrained YOLO `.pt` models in the browser. Users pick a model, run inference on uploaded images or a live camera feed, and download annotated results. A FastAPI backend serves model metadata and inference; a Vite + React client handles the mobile-first UX with a local dev proxy to the API.
highlights: Metadata-driven model catalog — swap pretrained YOLO weights via `models.json`
Still-image upload and live camera inference with downloadable annotated output
FastAPI backend for model metadata and inference; Vite dev proxy for local workflow
Docker, nginx, and GitHub Actions paths for production deploy and CI

items: Private model weights and custom training datasets
Production deployment URLs and client use cases
Inference latency benchmarks and accuracy metrics
Internal API keys, environment configs, and security scan results
restricted.label: Deployments, benchmarks, custom models, and production configs are available on request
